sections.paragraph: εἰϰῇ [cp. εἴκω ‘give way, yield’; cp. εἰϰαῖος ‘without aim or purpose’; the underlying idea is ‘at random’] ‘without sufficient reason or good cause’, without cause, to no purpose Mt 5:22 v.l.; Ro 13:4; 1 Cor 15:2; Gal 3:4; 4:11; Col 2:18 (the basic idea ‘at random’ appears to surface, prob. suggesting that some persons are puffed up by whatever comes into their heads).
